name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next state *)
Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking" /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i starts eating if both forks are available *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                states[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = i /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = LEFT(i)
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = LEFT(i), ![LEFT(i)] = i]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                states[i] = "eating"
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![LEFT(i)] = LEFT(i)]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES queue, size

Init == /\ queue = <<>>
        /\ size = 0

Next == \/ /\ size < K
          /\ queue' = Append(queue, 1)
          /\ size' = size + 1
        \/ /\ size > 0
          /\ queue' = Tail(queue)
          /\ size' = size - 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<queue, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys: /\ store' = store
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_CHUNKS
VARIABLES fileChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

Init ==
    /\ fileChunks = FILE_CHUNKS
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0

Next ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, Head(fileChunks))
    /\ fileChunks' = Tail(fileChunks)
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    \/ /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ fileChunks' = fileChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
       /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 1
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 2
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 1
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol

---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> 
        /\ infected = <<>> 

Next == /\ known' = Append(known, 1)
        /\ infected' = Append(infected, 1)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == \/ /\ free # {}
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
              /\ allocated' = [c \in Client |-> IF c = client THEN allocated[c] \cup {p} ELSE allocated[c]]
          /\ free' = free
              /\ allocated' = [c \in Client |-> IF c = client THEN {} ELSE allocated[c]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ allocated \in [Client -> SUBSET Pages]
          /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in Client: c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] \cap allocated[c2] = {}

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ /\ turn = 0
           /\ wants[0] = FALSE
           /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = TRUE]
           /\ turn' = 1
           /\ UNCHANGED <<wants[1], turn>>
       \/ /\ turn = 1
           /\ wants[1] = FALSE
           /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
           /\ turn' = 0
           /\ UNCHANGED <<wants[0], turn>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0,1}
          /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
